tweet.text:
A big week for Jito. Starting with JIP-38 which cements Jito as a token-centric network.

That means, there should be no concerns that value is being accrued across the Jito Network to equity, rather than the token. It means all of the revenue that the DAO collects from JTX is going to buyback and burns for at least a year (that’s 80% of all JTX fees). It means that all Jito Revenue streams are directed to token growth, or direct token value accrual.

Take a look at the proposal for details, but effectively this means that not only does JTO fully benefit from all network revenues, but the DAO
